issues.title: Refactor Chat Generation Metadata to allow addition of different AI model result/message specific (meta)data.
issues.body:
Currently the ChatGenerationMetadata is not flexible to accommodate the additional (meta)data commit from the various AI models. 
Currently it is restricted to finishReason and unstructured filters response.

comments.body: This has been addressed in the commit https://github.com/tzolov/spring-ai/commit/c308cbc4d21d0e4c2e0f655b28e6a89371778338
